title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of the mysteriously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for Daisy Buchanan.

title: Frankenstein
author: Mary Shelley
description: A scientist creates a sentient creature in an unorthodox experiment, exploring themes of ambition, isolation, and humanity.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: Elizabeth Bennet navigates love, reputation, and misunderstanding in Regency England.
